description_long: This high chair features a geometric, angular design with a solid green color and a robust, monolithic appearance. The seat is elevated and supported by four thick, straight legs, with two horizontal support bars connecting the legs on each side for added stability. The top surface is flat and slightly beveled at the edges, providing a comfortable sitting area. The chair is constructed from a single molded piece of plastic, giving it a seamless and durable structure. There are no visible moving parts, footrests, or safety harnesses, and the open sides beneath the seat allow for easy cleaning and maintenance. Its minimalist style and sturdy build make it suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks, plazas, or public seating areas.
description: A solid, green, angular high chair with a flat seat and open sides, made from molded plastic. Its minimalist, sturdy design is ideal for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open rectangular space beneath the seat and the two horizontal support bars.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth of the seat and the thickness of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with open space and support bars visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the same features as the front but from the other side.
